functions.name: addSftp
functions.description: Adds atmoz SFTP to the application model.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The SFTP port number for the atmoz SFTP container.

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: ConnectionString for the atmoz SFTP server in the form of sftp://host:port.

functions.name: host
functions.description: Gets the host endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: port
functions.description: Gets the port endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: uriExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection URI expression for the atmoz SFTP endpoint.

functions.name: withHostKeyFile
functions.description: Adds a bind mount for the specified host key file to an SFTP container resource.

parameters.name: keyFile
parameters.description: The path to the host key file.

parameters.name: keyType
parameters.description: The type of the host key.

functions.name: withUserKeyFile
functions.description: Adds a bind mount for the public key file of the specified user to an SFTP container resource.
functions.signature: withUserKeyFile(username: string, keyFile: string, keyType: KeyType): SftpContainerResource

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The user whose public key is being bind mounted

parameters.name: keyFile
parameters.description: The public key file of the specified user (will be bind mounted on the server).

parameters.name: keyType
parameters.description: The type of the host key.

functions.name: withUsersFile
functions.description: Adds a bind mount for the users.conf file to an SFTP container resource.

parameters.name: usersFile
parameters.description: The path to the users.conf file.

handleTypes.name: SftpContainerResource
handleTypes.description: A resource that represents an SFTP container.

handleTypes.name: KeyType
handleTypes.description: Specifies the types of cryptographic keys supported for digital signatures.
